headline: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) Surprises With Q2 CY2026 Sales
summary: Uniform and facility services provider Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) reported Q2 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 8.9% year on year to $2.91 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $12.18 billion at the midpoint came in 0.8% above analysts’ estimates. Its GAAP profit of $1.26 per share was 2.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) Q4 Earnings Deliver Quality Growth Amid EPS Beat and Record Margins
summary: Cintas Q4 earnings beat EPS estimates with record 51% gross margin, while revenue slightly missed. Shares rose 0.9% pre-market on strong profitability and fiscal 2027 guidance aligning with analyst targets.

headline: Cintas Corporation Announces Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
summary: CINCINNATI, July 15, 2026--Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) today reported results for its fiscal 2026 fourth quarter ended May 31, 2026. Revenue for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026 was $2.91 billion compared to $2.67 billion in last year’s fourth quarter, an increase of 8.9%. The organic revenue growth rate for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, which adjusts for the impacts of acquisitions and foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations, was 8.4%.

raw.headline: Cintas Corporation Announces Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results

The organic revenue growth rate for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, which adjusts for the impacts of acquisitions and foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations, was 8.4%.
